THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WESTLUND, JOSEPH A. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1155 MARKET STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION IS AGAINST DEFT JOSEPH WESTLUND, ETC COMPLAINT AGAINST DEFT ANDREA MINUTOLI IS DISMISSED. DEFT WESTLUND TO PAY PLTF. $1,500 FOR MAY, 1997 RENT PLUS $50 PER DAY DAMAGES AFTER 5/31/97. PLTF. AWARDED COURT COSTS AND ATTYS FEES AS PER COST BILL. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
